one_line_description: Cloud accounting platform for small businesses covering invoicing, bank reconciliation, payroll, and reporting.
auth_summary: OAuth 2.0 only: standard authorization-code flow (with PKCE support for native apps) for multi-tenant apps, and an OAuth2 client_credentials flow for single-org 'custom connections'. Access tokens expire after 30 minutes with refresh tokens.
access_notes: Free developer account with a fully functional Demo Company for testing; production works self-serve from day one for up to 25 connected companies. Exceeding 25 connections requires becoming a certified Xero App Partner (multi-checkpoint certification), and custom-connection (client credentials) apps are a separate premium arrangement.
api_surface_summary: Broad REST APIs: Accounting (invoices, contacts, payments, bank transactions, reports), plus Payroll, Assets, Files, Projects, and Practice Manager APIs, with granular OAuth scopes.
main_blocker: Uncertified apps are capped at 25 production company connections; scaling beyond requires Xero App Partner certification
agent_notes: Xero maintains an official MCP server (XeroAPI/xero-mcp-server, npx @xeroapi/xero-mcp-server) using custom-connection OAuth2 client credentials, plus a xero-agent-toolkit repo of agent examples. Note the scope-model migration: custom connections created from April 29, 2026 use new granular V2 scopes.
